meaning: 新西伯利亚[原苏联西西伯利亚东南部城市](音译诺沃西比尔斯克)
examples: The so-called October Bridge connects two areas in Novosibirsk.
Today we’ll have a look at a hadron collider of the Nuclear Physics Institute in Novosibirsk.
Parts were reported to have crashed back down into the Novosibirsk region of central Siberia.
Despite Mr Ivanov's lack of panache, some scientists at the academy near Novosibirsk seemed impressed.
